name: audit-lead-radar
description: Recommend Korean listed service opportunities for the Samil PwC persona by combining Saramin hiring signals with OpenDART auditor, fee/time, executive, and firm-context signals.

interface.shortDescription: Recommend listed service opportunities from hiring and OpenDART signals.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for Samil PwC-persona opportunity research. It uses Saramin hiring signals plus OpenDART public disclosures for listed companies to identify likely Assurance/Risk, Tax, Deals, Capital Markets, and Finance Transformation demand, then checks current auditor, auditor tenure, audit service fee/time, executive major-career signals, and configured firm context.
defaultPrompt: OpenDART 기반 감사인 지정 타이밍과 감사보수를 분석해줘.
최근 채용공고에서 삼일 서비스 수요 신호를 추출해줘.
Samil Listed Audit Radar 웹서비스를 실행해줘.
